title: Duplicate \uXXXX/surrogate logic between json_parse_string and json_skip_string
description: Both json_parse_string and json_skip_string implement identical \uXXXX validation and surrogate-pair logic independently (~40 lines each). The finding in P1 above (different single-char escape behavior) was caused by exactly this divergence. Extract a shared json_validate_uXXXX helper used by both, so any future fix to surrogate handling applies in one place. Suggested rewrite: fn json_consume_uXXXX(chars: &mut Peekable<Chars>) -> Result<Option<char>, SecretError> that returns the char (for parse path) or None (skip path can discard), handling all surrogate-pair logic once.
